key.name: language
key.description: Language code for the interface (for example "fr"), or empty to follow the system language. Falls back to English when the system language is unavailable.

key.name: default-delay-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds to wait between sending each message in a new campaign.

key.name: default-stop-on-error
key.summary: Stop on first error by default
key.description: Whether new campaigns halt as soon as a message fails to send.

key.name: test-recipient
key.description: The email address used by the Send test action.

key.name: default-cc
key.description: Comma-separated Cc addresses pre-filled when creating a new campaign.

key.name: default-bcc
key.description: Comma-separated Bcc addresses pre-filled when creating a new campaign.
